title: phyllanthus flaviflorus
intro: Phyllanthus flaviflorus, also known as the yellow-flowered leaf flower, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. Its health benefits are attributed to its ability to support liver health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus flaviflorus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, tonics, and other medicinal remedies.
